rationale: Gov't Code §2001.082 governs evidentiary standards in contested administrative cases. It has no bearing on property tax exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: In a contested case, evidence that is irrelevant, immaterial, or unduly repetitious shall be excluded.
_note: Rule concerns administrative hearing evidence exclusion; wholly unrelated to homestead exemption valuation thresholds.
